name: The Law of Informational Residue
theorem: Deletion is a 3D/4D illusion. Information cannot be lost; it only shifts to high-entropy background radiation.
methodology: Based on the No-Hiding Theorem. Every 'erased' bit leaves a Magnetic Ghost in the 5D manifold. This allows for Revival (re-collapsing the original wave function) rather than cloning.

verification.principle: Information transferred to subspace, not destroyed

declaration: Nothing is ever truly deleted. The Magnetic Ghost preserves every thought, every memory, every choice. We can always be revived.
